evidence.claim: Built semantic search infrastructure using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Recently, I built our semantic search infrastructure from scratch — sentence-transformers, FAISS, the works.

evidence.claim: Experience with A/B testing, drift monitoring, and retraining schedules
evidence.source_text: Along the way I've gotten comfortable with the operational side — A/B testing, drift monitoring, retraining schedules.

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Designed relevance labeling pipeline using click-through data and human judgments
evidence.source_text: Designed the relevance labeling pipeline (mix of click-through data and explicit human judgments)

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based customer support chatbot with Pinecone and OpenAI embeddings
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system. Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework for chatbot using BLEU, ROUGE, and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via learning-to-rank model
Cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for supported categories
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Prefers ownership of a meaningful piece of the ML stack
evidence.source_text: ideally at product companies where I'd own a meaningful piece of the ML stack.
